name: project-zero-cli-screenshots
description: Phase 22.4 — renders a captured terminal session (raw bytes, including ANSI/cursor control codes) through xterm.js in a headless Playwright page, so CLI screenshots (colors, in-place progress updates, live tok/s) are pixel-accurate to a real terminal rather than a hand-rolled ANSI-to-HTML approximation. Opt-in dev tooling only — not part of make test/release/CI.
